summary: Auth system testing complete. Custom JWT-based authentication fully functional. Backend: 15/15 tests passed covering registration, login, profile endpoints and validation. Frontend: All auth flows working - signup, login, dashboard redirect, protected route guards, and logout.

minor.issue: JWT secret 'product-intel-6' is only 15 bytes, below recommended 32 bytes for SHA256. Console shows InsecureKeyLengthWarning. Not a functional issue but a security warning.

integration_issues.issue: Mixed Content error for /api/notifications - appears to be Emergent preview environment script issue (emergent-main.js), not application code. The app's API client uses correct HTTPS URL.

issues: Onboarding modal blocks first-time user interaction (but has Skip button)

passed_tests: Backend: API health check
Backend: Register new user - returns token and user
Backend: Reject duplicate email registration
Backend: Reject invalid email format
Backend: Reject password < 6 characters
Backend: Admin login (jenkinslisa1978@gmail.com)
Backend: Regular user login (testuser@test.com)
Backend: Reject invalid credentials
Backend: Reject non-existent user login
Backend: Reject empty fields on login
Backend: Admin profile returns is_admin=true
Backend: Regular user profile returns is_admin=false
Backend: Reject profile request without token
Backend: Reject profile request with invalid token
Backend: Full register-login-profile flow
Frontend: Landing page accessible without auth
Frontend: Login page form elements visible with correct data-testid
Frontend: Signup page form elements visible with correct data-testid
Frontend: Admin login redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: New user registration redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Regular user login redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Protected route /dashboard redirects to /login when unauthenticated
Frontend: Login page accessible after logout
critical_code_review_comments: Auth implementation is solid - JWT tokens properly include sub, email, role, iat, exp claims
Admin detection via email comparison (jenkinslisa1978@gmail.com) works correctly
Token stored in localStorage with key 'trendscout_token'
Profile endpoint creates minimal profile if none exists (good fallback)
Consider using a stronger JWT secret (current is 15 bytes, recommended 32+)
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created during backend testing for registration flow validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom JWT auth system fully tested and working. Key endpoints: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/profile. Token stored in localStorage as 'trendscout_token'. Admin determined by email match to 'jenkinslisa1978@gmail.com'. Frontend uses AuthContext with data-testid attributes: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn, signup-name-input, signup-email-input, signup-password-input, signup-submit-btn.

registration.details: Creates user in auth_users collection, creates profile, returns JWT token

login.details: Validates credentials against bcrypt hash, returns JWT token

profile.details: Returns user profile with is_admin flag, requires valid JWT

admin_access.details: Admin user (jenkinslisa1978@gmail.com) has is_admin=true and elite plan
